# Bill Bergquist — Web Developer & Designer

> I build fast, modern websites for small businesses. Based in Denver, Colorado.

## Quick Facts
- Staff Software Engineer with 14+ years of experience
- Based in Denver/Lakewood, Colorado
- BS Computer Engineering, Purdue University
- Currently Staff Engineer at Kasa (React, TypeScript, Node.js) while freelancing for local businesses
- Every site I build scores 95+ on Google Lighthouse
- Pricing: $2,000–$8,000 for most small business websites
- Free website audits available on request
- Twitter/X: @BergquistDev

## Services
I offer web design and development for small businesses in Denver, Lakewood, Boulder, and across the Colorado Front Range. Services include:

- **Business Websites** — Professional sites built to get found online, load fast, and convert visitors
- **Landing Pages** — Single-page sites focused on one goal: bookings, signups, or sales
- **Website Redesign** — Modernize outdated sites with better performance, design, and SEO
- **Ongoing Support** — Updates, maintenance, and a real person to call after launch
- **Free Website Audit** — Submit your URL and get a report on speed, mobile experience, SEO, and quick wins

- Highlands Ranch: https://billbergquist.dev/services/highlands-ranch/
- Also serving: Wheat Ridge, Englewood, Centennial, Broomfield, Thornton, Edgewater, Commerce City, Parker, Castle Rock, and remote clients anywhere

### Tools
- Cost calculator: https://billbergquist.dev/services/estimate/
- Lighthouse scores: https://billbergquist.dev/services/performance/

## Tech Stack
Astro, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Cloudflare Workers, Netlify. I build static-first sites with React islands for interactivity. No bloated frameworks, no unnecessary JavaScript.

## Portfolio

### Client Work
- **Critter Care** (https://critter-care.com) — Rebuilt a pet sitting business website from a $53/month IONOS template to a custom Astro site. Perfect Lighthouse scores, under 1 second load time, $0/month hosting. Case study: https://billbergquist.dev/blog/rebuilding-critter-care-website/

### Side Projects
- **CreatiCalc** (https://creaticalc.com) — Free calculator suite for content creators. YouTube revenue estimates, engagement rates, sponsorship pricing across major platforms. Built as an SEO learning experiment.
- **Sports Shortcuts** (https://sportsshortcuts.com) — Injury alert generator for sports reporters. Built in a weekend for a friend. Generates standardized NFL and NBA game-day messages with autocomplete player search.
- **RetroRetro** (https://billbergquist.dev/retro/) — Real-time retrospective tool with rooms, sticky notes, voting, drag-and-drop grouping, timer, and CSV export. Built on Cloudflare Workers and WebSockets.

### Games
- **Minesweeper: Descent** (https://billbergquist.dev/arcade/descent/) — Roguelike minesweeper with procedural generation, upgrades, and permadeath
- **Gridlock** (https://billbergquist.dev/arcade/gridlock/) — Puzzle game

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **How much does a website cost?** Most small business sites I build land between $2,000 and $8,000. Landing pages are on the lower end.
- **How long does it take?** Usually 3 to 6 weeks from start to launch.
- **Do you work outside Denver?** Yes. I work with businesses across the Front Range and remotely.
- **Will my site work on mobile?** I build mobile-first. Every site is tested on real devices.
- **Can you help with SEO?** SEO basics are baked into every build: clean structure, meta tags, fast load times, structured data, and local schema markup.
- **What about after launch?** I offer ongoing support and don't disappear after your site goes live.
